goal: Ship a safe, lead-linked inquiry thread so one customer and one professional can message each other in-app.
inScope: Exactly one conversation per lead between one customer and one professional
Send/receive plain-text messages only (no rich formatting)
Conversation view with chronological message history
Conversation list showing last message preview and unread count
Mark messages as read when conversation is opened
Minimal moderation hooks: report message, block participant in conversation, admin hide message
outOfScope: Typing indicators, read receipts, online presence
rules: Only conversation participants can read or send in that conversation
Conversation is created only from an existing lead
If either participant blocks, no further messages can be sent in that conversation
Messages are immutable in MVP; only admin can hide
Server rejects empty, oversized, or unsafe (HTML/script) message bodies
Rate limit message sending per user to reduce spam
acceptanceCriteria: Given a valid lead with customer + professional, when first message is sent, then exactly one conversation exists for that lead
Given a participant sends a message, when recipient opens thread list, then unread count increments and last-message preview matches latest message
Given recipient opens the conversation, then unread count becomes 0 and lastReadMessageId is updated
Given a non-participant requests the conversation, then API returns forbidden/not found and no message data
Given a participant is blocked in the conversation, when they attempt to send, then message is rejected and not persisted
Given a participant reports a message, then a moderation record exists with reporter, reason, and timestamp
Given admin hides a message, then participants no longer see the message body while moderation/audit record remains intact
